name: skill-creator
tagline: Official Anthropic skill for authoring new skills — scaffolding, structure, and evaluation guidance.
verdict: Contradicts itself on a key rule — it forbids using /skill-test in one place, then tells you to skip evaluation elsewhere, so which instruction wins is unclear. Several other steps lean on vague judgment calls ('different metaphors') with no way to check if you did it right.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language anywhere in description or body.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
Packaging failure is addressed, but the equally risky init_skill.py step (Step 3) has no stated failure handling.
